description: Evaluates security operations (SOC) maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, SOC systems and team, escalation, behavioural analysis, correlation, compliance visibility, scanning, real-time monitoring, threat containment, threat intelligence, and trend analysis.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A SOC service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: SOC KPIs and KRIs are formalized, documented, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for SOC service

capabilities.name: SOC System
capabilities.description: A unified SOC system processes logs enterprise-wide, deploys SOAR, is reviewed, and integrates with other security systems.
evaluation_focus: Unified SOC system processing raw logs
Enterprise-wide or multiple SOC deployment scope
SOAR initiatives as part of SOC
SOC config and log processing review
Integration with vulnerability, patch management, and enforcement points

capabilities.name: SOC team
capabilities.description: A clear T1, T2, and T3 analyst hierarchy captures anomalies with defined FTE or contractor staffing.
evaluation_focus: T1, T2, and T3 analyst hierarchy for incident analysis

capabilities.name: Escalation process
capabilities.description: A formalized incident escalation process is automated where possible and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Automated incident escalation by SOC system

capabilities.name: Behavioural Analysis
capabilities.description: The SOC system performs behavioural analysis automatically with frequent accuracy review.

capabilities.name: Correlation
capabilities.description: The SOC correlates identity, device, network, threat, application, and data logs with threat hunting activities.

capabilities.name: Device compliance Visibility
capabilities.description: Compliance visibility logs are sent to the SOC for correlation.
evaluation_focus: Compliance visibility logs sent to SOC

capabilities.name: Software based scanning
capabilities.description: The SOC performs software-based scanning automatically with frequent accuracy review.

capabilities.name: Real time monitoring
capabilities.description: The SOC monitors logs in real time.

capabilities.name: Rapid Threat containment
capabilities.description: The SOC blocks access based on compromise threats with automatic blocking and unblocking.
evaluation_focus: Block access based on compromise threats
Automatic blocking and unblocking of compromised or remediated resources

capabilities.name: Monitoring KPI/KRI of various management services
capabilities.description: The SOC monitors artifacts necessary for other services' KPIs and KRIs.
evaluation_focus: SOC monitors KPI/KRI artifacts for other management services

capabilities.name: Threat intelligence Management
capabilities.description: A threat intelligence platform ingests information automatically, is reviewed, and integrates with SOC and other segments.
evaluation_focus: Threat intelligence platform and management service
Automatic threat intelligence ingestion and remediation recommendations
Frequent threat intelligence accuracy and relevance review
Threat intelligence integration with SOC and other segments

capabilities.name: Application trend analysis with ADM
capabilities.description: The SOC identifies enterprise trends automatically on dashboards with frequent accuracy review.
evaluation_focus: Identify enterprise trends on SOC dashboard

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
